enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Thiyagam Seivom Va conveys a message of sacrifice and unity among Tamils, encouraging listeners to embrace their identity.

In which movie is this song featured?

The movie for Thiyagam Seivom Va is currently unknown.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Arunraja Kamaraj and GV Prakash Kumar.

Who is the music director?

The music for Thiyagam Seivom Va is composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

Thiyagam Seivom Va was released on March 10, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Thiyagam Seivom Va serves as a rallying cry for Tamil pride and unity. It encapsulates the emotions of determination and resilience, urging listeners to embrace their cultural identity. The energetic beats and powerful lyrics evoke a sense of motivation, making it perfect for celebrations and festivals. Through its uplifting message, the song inspires a collective spirit among Tamils.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thiyagam Seivom Va is a powerful anthem that resonates with the spirit of unity and determination. Featuring the dynamic vocals of Arunraja Kamaraj and GV Prakash Kumar, this song is a celebration of Tamil pride and resilience. The collaboration between these talented artists brings an infectious energy that is sure to inspire listeners everywhere.
stanzaMeanings: Thiyagam Seivom Vaa Song Lyrics GV Prakash Kumar
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa Tamizha
Don't sleep, Tamizha. Don't fall, Tamizha. Don't get confused, Tamizha. Don't get lost, Tamizha.
We are Tamils who will sacrifice. If someone comes, we will stand together.
We will carry the burdens. Will all pleasures be lost? What are the punishments, what are the rules, are they all in the life of the soul?
Some burdens will make the wings fly. Many names will break like wings.
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Mother, Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa.
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa, Tamizha. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa.
Don't sleep, Tamizha. Don't fall, Tamizha. Don't get confused, Tamizha. Don't get lost, Tamizha.
To learn the truth, we must stand firm and not give up.
To overcome obstacles, we must create paths for the desires of youth.
You work for others, and you create your own fate. Come, let’s unite in the work.
We will break the divisions and the burdens, and we will rise above the challenges.
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Mother, Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa.
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa, Tamizha. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa.
In the gates of heaven, we will find the way to escape.
This change will give us a chance, and we will all escape from the gates of hell.
Tamizha.. Tamizha..
We will carry the burdens. Will all pleasures be lost? What are the punishments, what are the rules, are they all in the life of the soul?
Some burdens will make the wings fly. Many names will break like wings.
The justice that does not fail will give to our land, seeking the path of darkness.
Without knowing which gate, we will wander every day, Tamizha, in the direction of Tamizha.
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Mother, Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa.
Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa, Tamizha. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa. Thiyagam Seivom Vaa.
